children.name: 登录接口-缺少密码参数
parameters: {'case_name': '登录接口-缺少密码参数', 'method': 'POST', 'path': 'sqx_fast/app/Login/emailLogin', 'content-type': 'application/json', 'username': '1@qq.com', 'expect_status': 200, 'msg': 'Incorrect account or password'}

children.name: 登录接口-账号为空
parameters: {'case_name': '登录接口-账号为空', 'method': 'POST', 'path': 'sqx_fast/app/Login/emailLogin', 'content-type': 'application/json', 'username': None, 'password': 123456, 'expect_status': 200, 'msg': 'Account does not exist'}

children.name: 登录接口-密码为空
parameters: {'case_name': '登录接口-密码为空', 'method': 'POST', 'path': 'sqx_fast/app/Login/emailLogin', 'content-type': 'application/json', 'username': '1@qq.com', 'password': None, 'expect_status': 200, 'msg': 'Incorrect account or password1'}
